postReview.title: Minnesota United 2-2 LA Galaxy: Garces rescues a point amid late drama
postReview.description: Carlos Garces spared LA Galaxy's blushes with a 90th-minute goal to cancel out Kelvin Yeboah’s brace in a 2-2 thriller.
